name: pi-web-lite
description: Lightweight web_search and fetch tools for Pi with Exa, Tavily, Brave, auto priority, and balanced provider-key pools.

scripts.check: node --input-type=module -e "await import('./src/config.ts'); await import('./src/search.ts'); await import('./src/fetch.ts')" && node --input-type=module -e "try { await import('./src/index.ts') } catch (err) { if (err?.code === 'ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND') process.exit(0); throw err }"
